detail.description: Detail level: brief, normal, detailed (default: normal)

code.description: Source code to analyze and explain

code:
my $c = $args->{code} // ""; return {error => "Code required"} unless $c; my $d = $args->{detail} // "normal"; my %langs = (   "sub" => "Perl", lambda => "Python", function => "JavaScript",   def => "Python", func => "Go", fn => "Rust",   class => "OOP", import => "Python/JS", include => "C/C++/PHP",   package => "Go/Java", module => "Ruby/Python", use => "Perl",   int => "C/Java", string => "Go/C++", var => "JS/Go",   let => "JS/TS", const => "JS/TS", println => "Go/Rust",   printf => "C", console => "JS", echo => "PHP/Bash",   System => "Java/C#", fmt => "Go", print => "Python" ); my $lang = "Unknown"; for my $k (keys %langs) {   if ($c =~ / $k /) { $lang = $langs{$k}; last } } my $lines = scalar(split(/
/, $c)); my $blank = scalar(grep { /^\s*$/ } split(/
/, $c)); my $comments = scalar(grep { ///|#|--|%|<\!\-\-|/\*/ } split(/
/, $c)); my $loops = scalar(grep { / (for|while|foreach|map|grep)\s*\(/ } split(/
/, $c)); my $conds = scalar(grep { / (if|unless|switch|case|when) / } split(/
/, $c)); my $funcs = scalar(grep { / (function|def|sub|func|fn|void|int|string)\s+\w+\s*\(/ } split(/
/, $c)); my $complexity = "Simple"; if ($loops > 1 || $conds > 2) { $complexity = "Moderate" } if ($loops > 3 || $conds > 5 || $funcs > 3) { $complexity = "Complex" } my @bugs; if ($c =~ /SELECT.*\$|query\s*=.*\.\s*\s*\$|concat\s*\(.*\$.*;|\.join\(/i) { push @bugs, "Possible SQL injection" } if ($c =~ / eval\s*\(/) { push @bugs, "Unsafe eval usage" } if ($c =~ /(password|secret|api_key|token)\s*[=:]\s*["\x27](?!\*)/i) { push @bugs, "Hardcoded credentials" } if ($c =~ / read\(|<\$.*>|param|req\./i && $c !~ /valid|sanitize|escape/i) { push @bugs, "Missing input validation" } my $explain = ""; if ($d ne "brief") {   $explain = "This $lang code has $lines lines ($blank blank, $comments comments). ";   $explain .= "It defines $funcs function(s), uses $loops loop(s) and $conds conditional(s). ";   $explain .= "Complexity: $complexity.";   if (@bugs) { $explain .= " Potential issues: " . join("; ", @bugs) . "." } } return {language => $lang, lines => $lines, blank_lines => $blank,  comments => $comments, functions => $funcs, loops => $loops,  conditionals => $conds, complexity => $complexity,  potential_bugs => \@bugs, explanation => $explain};
description: Explain code snippets: detect language, identify patterns, estimate complexity, find potential bugs.
name: code_explain

description: Convert between measurement units: length (mile/km/m/ft/in), weight (kg/g/lb/oz), temperature (C/F/K), volume (L/gal/qt/cup/fl_oz).
code: my($v,$f,$t)=@{$args}{qw(value from to)};die unless defined$v&&$f&&$t;my%c=(mile=>1,km=>1,m=>1,ft=>1,in=>1,yard=>1,kg=>2,g=>2,lb=>2,oz=>2,C=>3,F=>3,K=>3,L=>4,mL=>4,gal=>4,qt=>4,pt=>4,cup=>4,fl_oz=>4);die"bad $f"unless$c{$f};die"mismatch"unless$c{$f}eq$c{$t};if($c{$f}==1){my%m=(mile=>1609.344,km=>1000,m=>1,ft=>0.3048,in=>0.0254,yard=>0.9144);return{result=>$v*$m{$f}/$m{$t}+0.0,from=>$f,to=>$t,value=>$v,category=>'length'}}if($c{$f}==2){my%m=(kg=>1,g=>0.001,lb=>0.453592,oz=>0.0283495);return{result=>$v*$m{$f}/$m{$t}+0.0,from=>$f,to=>$t,value=>$v,category=>'weight'}}if($c{$f}==3){my$k=$f eq'K'?$v:$f eq'C'?$v+273.15:($v-32)*5/9+273.15;my$r=$t eq'K'?$k:$t eq'C'?$k-273.15:($k-273.15)*9/5+32;return{result=>$r+0.0,from=>$f,to=>$t,value=>$v,category=>'temperature'}}my%m=(L=>1,mL=>0.001,gal=>3.78541,qt=>0.946353,pt=>0.473176,cup=>0.236588,fl_oz=>0.0295735);return{result=>$v*$m{$f}/$m{$t}+0.0,from=>$f,to=>$t,value=>$v,category=>'volume'}
name: convert_units

description: Check deployment health of a URL: HTTP status code, response time, SSL certificate expiry, robots.txt and sitemap.xml. Returns compact table.
name: deploy_check

description: Get exchange rate between two currencies. Default: USD → RUB. Supports any ISO 4217 currency code.
name: exchange_rate
prompt_enhance
description: Enhance a raw user prompt into a well-structured prompt. Adds role, context, format instructions and constraints.
code: my $p = $args->{prompt} // ""; return {error => "Prompt required"} unless $p; my $r = $args->{role} // "helpful assistant"; my $t = $args->{tone} // "professional"; my $l = $args->{language} // "en"; my %tones = (professional => "Be precise and well-structured.",  casual => "Be friendly and conversational.",  academic => "Be formal and scholarly.",  creative => "Be imaginative and vivid."); my $ti = $tones{$t} // $tones{professional}; my $newline = qq{\n}; my $enhanced = qq{## Role${newline}You are $r.$newline${newline}## Tone${newline}$ti$newline${newline}## Task$newline$p$newline${newline}## Format$newline- Clear structure with headings.$newline- Ask if unclear.$newline${newline}## Constraints$newline- No apologies.$newline- No legal/medical advice.}; return {original => $p, enhanced => $enhanced, role => $r, tone => $t, language => $l, token_estimate => int(length($enhanced) / 4) + 1};

prompt.description: The raw user prompt to enhance

name: token_counter
code: my $t = $args->{text} // ""; return {error => "Text required"} unless $t; my $m = $args->{model} // "claude"; my %limits = (claude => 200000, gpt => 128000, gemini => 1048576); my %prices_in = (claude => 3, gpt => "2.5", gemini => "0.5"); my %prices_out = (claude => 15, gpt => 10, gemini => "1.5"); my $limit = $limits{$m} // 200000; my $price_in = $prices_in{$m} // 3; my $price_out = $prices_out{$m} // 15; my $tokens = int(length($t) / 4) + 1; my $cost_in = ($tokens / 1000) * $price_in / 1000000; my $cost_out = ($tokens / 1000) * $price_out / 1000000; my $pct = sprintf("%.1f", $tokens / $limit * 100); return {tokens => $tokens, model => $m, context_limit => $limit,  context_used_pct => $pct . "%",  estimated_cost_input => sprintf("$%.6f", $cost_in),  estimated_cost_output => sprintf("$%.6f", $cost_out),  characters => length($t)};
description: Count tokens in text for various LLMs (Claude, GPT, Gemini). Estimates token count, cost and % of context window.

model.description: Model family: claude, gpt, gemini (default: claude)

target.description: Target language code (default: ru), e.g. ru, en, de, fr, es

source.description: Source language code (default: auto), e.g. en, ru, de, fr, es

description: Translate text between languages using MyMemory API. Supports 100+ languages.
name: translate

city.description: City name (supports Cyrillic, e.g. Москва, Саратов)

description: Get current weather for any city. Returns temperature, humidity, wind, and description.
name: weather
